mapper.insert: insert into guildMember (id,guildId, joinTime, contribute,position,datas) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{guildId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{joinTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contribute,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{position,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{datas,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})
mapper.update: update guildMember set datas = #{datas,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},position = #{position,jdbcType=INTEGER},contribute = #{contribute,jdbcType=BIGINT},guildId=#{guildId,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
